These likely indicate merged work that wasn't reflected in Linear — the closing PRs should probably trigger a state transition on those issues. Want me to update the linked Linear issues to `done`?

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT pr.number, pr.closes_linear
FROM github_pull_requests pr
JOIN linear_issues li ON li.id = pr.closes_linear
WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND li.state <> 'done';"}
